title: login api authentication and rate limiting
description: Test the /login POST endpoint to verify user authentication with correct username and password, ensure rate limiting is enforced to prevent brute force attacks, and validate session management via cookies.

title: change password api strength validation and confirmation
description: Test the /change-password POST endpoint to verify that password change requires matching new_password and confirm_password fields, enforce password strength validation, and ensure successful password update redirects appropriately.

title: ai chat api message handling and error responses
description: Test the /api/chat POST endpoint to verify that sending a valid message returns an AI response, handle missing message error with 400 status, simulate API key errors returning 500 status, and service unavailability returning 503 status.

title: courses api semester filtering and error handling
description: Test the /api/courses GET endpoint to verify that courses can be fetched filtered by semester query parameter, and handle internal server errors with appropriate 500 status response.

title: progress tracking api mark content as completed
description: Test the /actions/markContentAsCompleted POST endpoint to verify marking lessons or quizzes as completed, validate contentId and contentType inputs, and ensure correct XP rewards are calculated and returned.

title: progress tracking api submit quiz result and xp calculation
description: Test the /actions/submitQuizResult POST endpoint to verify submission of quiz scores, correct calculation and awarding of XP based on scorePercentage, and proper response structure.

title: onboarding api complete user onboarding with gpa
description: Test the /actions/completeOnboarding POST endpoint to verify completion of user onboarding process with GPA input, validate GPA value handling, and confirm successful onboarding response.
